hook: Most trading mistakes start before the trade is placed.

slides.text: Most trading mistakes start before the trade is placed.
slides.visual: Use assets/logos/logo.png exactly as supplied, topic title, and one clean visual cue.

slides.text: A young investor sees a fast-moving price, enters quickly, and only later asks, "How much could I lose here?"
slides.visual: Show a relatable young investor decision with simple labels and large mobile-readable text.

slides.text: Intraday Trading is about deciding the risk before thinking about the possible reward.
slides.visual: Use a plain-English explainer card with one idea only.

slides.text: If a ₹10,000 trade can lose ₹500, ask whether the possible reward is worth that risk before entering. If the answer is unclear, the trade is unclear.
slides.visual: Use a practical example card with portfolio, SIP, risk, or Rs 10,000 decision framing.

slides.text: Use intraday Trading as a decision filter, not as a shortcut.
slides.visual: Use a strong one-line takeaway with accent highlight.

slides.text: Save this before trying any trading style.
slides.visual: Show CTA, disclaimer, tagline "Build Wealth. Not Debt.", and assets/logos/logo.png without editing the logo.

cta: Save this before trying any trading style.

compliance.disclaimer: Educational content only. This is not financial advice.
